programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When Nicholas Helman resurfaces to carry out a killing spree, the team is forced to get help from the one person who knows him best -- his protégé, Murdoc.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The annual harvest fair and the daredevil riders of the Wall of Death arrive in Whitcombe Mallet; the owner of an equestrian center is trampled by his horse.

programme.title: One Day As a Lion
programme.desc: A clumsy hit man hooks up with a waitress, who creates a scheme for them to get cash from her ailing mother.

programme.title: War On Everyone
programme.desc: Two corrupt cops set out to blackmail and frame every criminal unfortunate enough to cross their path.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Three female employees of the Federal Reserve plot to steal money that is about to be destroyed.

programme.title: Queenpins
programme.desc: A pair of housewives create a $40 million coupon scam.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: Set in North Carolina, "A Walk To Remember" follows the rite of passage of a jaded, aimless high school senior (Shane West) who falls in love with a guileless young woman (Mandy Moore) he and his friends once scorned. The two develop a powerful and inspirational relationship in which they discover truths that take most people a lifetime to learn.

programme.title: Before I Go To Sleep [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Ever since a vicious attack nearly claimed her life, Christine Lucas (Nicole Kidman) has suffered from anterograde amnesia and is unable to form new memories. Every morning, she becomes reacquainted with her husband, Ben (Colin Firth), and the other constants in her life. In accordance with her doctor's (Mark Strong) instructions, Christine keeps a video diary. As Christine starts to uncover terrifying truths about her past, she begins to question everything -- and everyone -- around her.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Blind Horizon [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Found in the New Mexico desert with a head wound and total amnesia, Frank Kavanaugh (Val Kilmer) is brought to a hospital. When he recovers some of his memory, he begins raving about an upcoming assassination attempt on the president. Despite the man's unstable state, Sheriff Jack Kolb (Sam Shepard) is troubled by Frank's story. Discovering the truth grows more complicated when Chloe Richards (Neve Campbell) arrives and claims to be Frank's fiancée, even though he has no memory of her.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: A Haunted House 2
programme.desc: Having exorcised the demons of his ex, Malcolm is starting fresh with his new girlfriend.

programme.title: Take Me Home Tonight
programme.desc: Four years after graduation, an awkward high school genius uses his sister's boyfriend's Labor Day party

programme.title: The Gunman
programme.desc: A sniper on a mercenary assassination team kills the minister of mines of the Congo. Terrier's successful kill shot forces him into hiding. Returning to the Congo years later, he becomes the target of a hit squad himself.

programme.title: The Gunman
programme.desc: A sniper on a mercenary assassination team kills the minister of mines of the Congo. Terrier's successful kill shot forces him into hiding. Returning to the Congo years later, he becomes the target of a hit squad himself.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in.

programme.title: Fun With Dick And Jane
programme.desc: Dick Harper s (Jim Carrey) years of hard work finally pay off when he is promoted to vice president at Glabodyne, a world leader in the consolidation of media properties. But after exactly one day on his new job, Glabodyne is destroyed by an Enron-like calamity and he is left holding the bag. Dick s sudden reversal of fortune has left him little time to set aside money for a rainy day. After playing by the rules and working single-mindedly to build a comfortable life for his family, Dick is utterly unprepared to give up on the American dream. Taking a lesson from his corrupt employer, Dick hits on a brilliant idea: If stealing is good enough for his boss, then it s good enough for him. Using his new found skills, he and Jane exact hilarious revenge and teach big business a lesson.

programme.title: Blue Streak
programme.desc: Miles Logan (Martin Lawrence) is a talented jewel thief who has stolen $20 million dollars worth of diamonds and has hidden them at a construction site before being captured. Now, after three years in jail, he returns to pick up the diamonds only to find that the site is now a police precinct. To recover his stash, Logan has to impersonate a detective. Using his criminal expertise he solves case after case, earning the admiration of his "fellow cops" while desperately trying to get his diamonds.

programme.title: Money Train
programme.desc: Charlie, a New York City transit cop with a mountain of gambling debts, and John, his responsible, and frequently exasperated, foster brotherr, compete amicably for the affections of fellow officer Grace, but things become more serious when Charlie decides to rob the "money train" that carries the Transit Authority's daily proceeds. John must decide whether to prevent Charlie's crime or to join in on the heist.

programme.title: Anacondas: Trail Of Blood
programme.desc: Product of a botched experiment, a genetically enhanced anaconda offspring regenerates to create panic and destruction in this next action-packed chapter of the Anaconda series.

programme.title: Runaway (1984)
programme.desc: A cop of the future, an evil genius and a murderous robotic force in a deadly chase of runaway terror.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes To Washington
programme.desc: James Stewart takes on the powers-that-be in our nations capitol in Frank Capras timeless classic. Nominated for eleven 1939 Oscars, including best picture.

programme.title: Rusty Leads The Way
programme.desc: This boy-and-his-dog series casts Ted Donaldson as the kind young kid who's always helping someone or performing good deeds with the help of his canine buddy, Flame. The pair helps blind girl Sharyn Moffett cope with her handicap.

programme.title: Fire Down Below
programme.desc: A pair of small-time smugglers have a falling out over the love of a sexy, and disreputable, woman.

programme.title: The Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Arabian Nights-type of tale stars Agar as a deposed prince trying to free his people from the evil rule of the caliph, the princess Narah (Lucille Ball) and his vizier, played by Burr. Agar enlists the aid of harem girl Patricia Medina and together they win back the province, while zipping around on a flying carpet.

programme.title: Dragon Fist
programme.desc: Tong Huo-wan (Jackie Chan) seeks redress from the man responsible for his master's death, but becomes entangled in a feud between a local clan and gangsters.

programme.title: Hush

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: Chopping Mall

programme.title: 99 Homes
programme.desc: A recently unemployed single father struggles to get back his foreclosed home by working for the real estate broker who is the source of his frustration.

programme.title: Dauntless: The Battle Of Midway
programme.desc: By June 1942, the Japanese Navy has swept across the Pacific. In an effort to change the course of the war, a United States carrier group is positioned off the coast of Midway, tasked with springing a trap on the enemy. During this pivotal battle, the two-man crew of a U.S. Navy dive bomber is forced to ditch into the sea. Set adrift, the men look toward their comrades for rescue; namely the ragtag crew of an amphibious aircraft, who are sent to search for survivors. Lost in the vast openness of the Pacific, with days passing and the chance of rescue fading, the men are forced to face their own mortality.

programme.title: In the Blood
programme.desc: A vigilante bride must outwit and outfight a foreign underworld to uncover the secrets behind her husband's disappearance.

programme.title: The Doorman

programme.title: Rogue
programme.desc: A mercenary and her team has rescued hostages from a gang of murderous rebels, and is trying to survive.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: A freelance secret agent working for the government suspects that someone in her organization wants her dead.

programme.title: Pinkerton

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Evil
programme.desc: An assassin goes to Thailand in order to solve a kidnapping case and finds himself chased by a man whose sibling he killed.

programme.title: Raging Fire
programme.desc: Bong is a highly respected cop with a long history of success on dangerous cases. However, his past soon comes back to haunt him when his former protégé seeks revenge against all those who have wronged him.

programme.title: Sakra
programme.desc: Accused of murder, a martial artist goes on the run in search of answers about his own mysterious origins and the unknown enemies out to destroy him.

programme.title: Enter the Fat Dragon
programme.desc: A police officer investigates the mysterious death of a suspect who was in his custody during a routine transfer.

programme.title: Girl in the Shed: The Kidnapping of Abby Hernandez

programme.title: Girl in the Video
programme.desc: Krissy has secretly been chatting online with a cute boy named Toby.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: Following a difficult breakup in a string of failed relationships.

programme.title: I Was Octomom: The Natalie Suleman Story
programme.desc: Showcasing how "Octomom" overcame overwhelming odds to raise her children.

programme.title: I Was Honey Boo Boo
programme.desc: Alana Thompson, famously known as "Honey Boo Boo," narrates this Lifetime biopic.

programme.title: Mormon Mom Gone Wrong: The Ruby Franke Story
programme.desc: A web series about a seemingly perfect family turns dark, leading to child abuse.

programme.title: Secret Liaison
programme.desc: A woman travels from Los Angeles to Seattle to try to prevent her sister from going to prison for murder.

programme.title: My Mother's Stalker
programme.desc: Old friends gets together for a high school reunion, only for a crime to set off a series of tragic events.

programme.title: Dancing Trees
programme.desc: Martha, 18, has a form of autism. Although she is incapable of looking after herself, she is a mathematical genius.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant but must pretend to be married.

programme.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programme.desc: When Emma is hired to bake for a royal cake, she finds herself at odds with a Prince.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: The New Girl
programme.desc: When her sister Monica suddenly disappears under suspicious circumstances, Malorie becomes convinced that Monica's seemingly perfect husband is hiding something sinister. She then launches her own investigation and unearths a twisted web of lies, abuse, and even political conspiracy. Malorie must confront dangerous secrets that not only threaten her sister's life but her own.

programme.title: Threaded Lies
programme.desc: When rising fashion designer Dante prepares to launch his brand, haunting messages and resurfaced betrayals from his former partner threaten to unravel everything. As paranoia sets in, Dante must confront the lies he’s built his success on before they destroy him.

programme.title: Murder on the Blade
programme.desc: Tobin, a young man with a troubled childhood is currently working through his trauma with a professional counselor. Meanwhile, there is a serial killer on the loose targeting sex workers, and several clues are pointing to both him and his troubled relationship with his mother.

programme.title: Hail Mary
programme.desc: Mary went from having everything to losing it all within a blink of an eye. She taps into her inner hustle to help her get back on her feet. What starts off as a temporary hustle leads to a path of destruction.

programme.title: Money Gang Lit
programme.desc: Hakeem Benson, a down-on-his-luck videographer, is evicted and adrift. He takes a risky music video gig for Bull Dawg, a notorious kingpin. But when a respected gang member is murdered, Hakeem is falsely accused and targeted. Now, in a city on fire, he's fighting for his life and meaning amidst the chaos.

programme.title: Rich Intent
programme.desc: 16-year-old Quana yearns to go to her very first concert. When she gets the opportunity to see her favorite artist, her dreams quickly spiral into a horrific nightmare of imprisonment and shady deals.

programme.title: The Wait Game
programme.desc: Yolanda Hills, a woman deeply in love with her longtime partner Jonas Jones, has been patiently awaiting their wedding day. Their idyllic relationship takes a terrifying turn when a home intruder invades their peaceful sanctuary. Held captive in her own home, Yolanda is confronted with a shocking revelation that will forever alter the course of their lives.

programme.title: Monster Mash
programme.desc: Dr. Frankenstein wants to meld the world's strongest monsters into a singular, unstoppable creation.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Our Heroes must battle Zona Blends, Enders, Zombies and The Man to rescue Lucy.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: The entire California coastline is threatened as a 20.0 earthquake looms.

programme.title: A Haunting in Salem
programme.desc: The new sheriff of Salem, Mass., discovers he is cursed, and must protect his family from vengeful ghosts.
Parents, concerned about their son’s violent behavior, learn that their son is the gateway to the apocalypse.

programme.title: The 6th Friend
programme.desc: After their graduation party went wrong, friends reunite - but an uninvited guest brings horror and bloodshed.

programme.title: Dracula's Curse
programme.desc: A team of vampire hunters set out to battle an evil vampire clan in the dark underworld.

programme.title: Mermaid Down
programme.desc: A mermaid is ripped from the Pacific, her tail is chopped off and she's thrown into a mental home where no one believes she is a mermaid.

programme.title: Knightriders (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The members of a traveling Renaissance Faire, who saddle up on motorcycles instead of horses, ride from town to town to stage medieval jousting tournaments with combatants in suits of armor and wielding lances, battle-axes, maces and broadswords. The spectacle of this violent pageant soon garners national attention, much to the dismay of the current king of this Camelot. A challenger to his throne arises as they try to maintain their fairytale existence in a world wrought with corruption.

programme.title: Mega Piranha (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A mutant strain of giant ferocious piranha escape from the Amazon and eat their way toward Florida.

programme.title: Knightriders (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The members of a traveling Renaissance Faire, who saddle up on motorcycles instead of horses, ride from town to town to stage medieval jousting tournaments with combatants in suits of armor and wielding lances, battle-axes, maces and broadswords. The spectacle of this violent pageant soon garners national attention, much to the dismay of the current king of this Camelot. A challenger to his throne arises as they try to maintain their fairytale existence in a world wrought with corruption.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Hope comes in strange forms, and the question of what the men are willing to do to survive begins to be settled in both noble and horrifying ways.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The expedition's epic journey reaches its climax as men find themselves in a final confrontation with the Inuit mythology they've trespassed into.

programme.title: The Terror: Devil in Silver
programme.desc: Pepper, a moving man from Queens, is defending his girlfriend Marisol from a violent ex when he's arrested by three plainclothes cops. The cops commit Pepper to New Hyde Psychiatric Hospital for a 72 hour hold. Dr. Walter makes his first appearance.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Cassie is being chased by a monster, and endangers a kind stranger when she asks for help- but what can they do? Then, a celebrated photographer is tormented after an award-winning photograph has more consequences than just fame.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A horror novelist's agent offers him help overcoming his writer's block, and the struggling author can't resist. Then, Richard's wife is attacked and becomes a shell of the woman he loved. He'll do anything to help her feel better.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Lyle is a disappointment, and when his parents meddle in his life and their plan backfires, he must deal with the aftermath. Then, Marcia takes her stepdaughter to her grandmother's house to claim their inheritance, and nothing can stand in her way.

programme.title: Creepshow

Martha Vickers stars as Lolita Moreno, a convent raised woman in the 1880s who learns about her Native American heritage through her relationship with an educated Navajo. Morena had been raised at a California mission, but when she leaves to teach school in Arizona, the threads of her mysterious past are revealed. programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon, Carla Hall, and Clinton Kelly take on one of the internet’s most overhyped dishes — avocado toast — and each put their own spin on the trendy classic. Michael keeps things fresh and herb-forward with mashed avocado, citrus, chili flakes, dill, mint, chives, and crunchy sea salt while sharing his philosophy on cooking intuitively and using whatever is in the fridge or garden. Clinton recreates a nostalgic avocado and grapefruit salad from the 1980s, layering honey-drizzled grapefruit, poppy seeds, and red onion over avocado toast for a sweet and savory twist. Carla keeps hers simple and flavorful with fresh herbs and crispy shallots. Along the way, the hosts debate food trends, influencer culture, protein obsession, anchovies, and the infamous “avocado hand” kitchen injury, leading to plenty of playful bickering and laughs between Clinton and Michael. The show wraps with the trio agreeing that there’s no single right way to make avocado toast — it’s all about personal taste and creativity in the kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon dive into a tailgating-themed episode of CHEWED UP with Michael leading the charge. He fries up crispy Pork Schnitzel Sliders while sharing wild football stories, Carla admits she’s barely tailgated in her life, and Clinton once again finds himself assigned kitchen tasks he may or may not be qualified for. Between talk of The Chew’s abrupt cancellation, psychic predictions, and potato roll “squish” debates, the chaos continues.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton ushers in sweater weather with a decadent, over-the-top hot chocolate while the crew revisits the infamous "Eggnog-gate" story - a stomach-turning behind-the-scenes tale from their network TV days. Cozy vibes meet barely appropriate storytelling.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off the week with Crispy Baked Chicken Wings tossed in a hot honey and lime glaze. The hosts look back on the freeing final weeks of The Chew before its abrupt end, and Michael delivers a passionate rant against air fryers. The trio introduces their new interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and Clinton shares a hilarious story about how eating messy wings on a date made him realize he was gay!

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon revisits one of the most important dishes of his career as he makes his famous rotisserie chicken mac and cheese, a creamy pasta recipe that first became a hit at his Cleveland restaurant Piccolo Mondo in 1992. Using rigatoni, heavy cream, goat cheese, fresh rosemary, and shredded rotisserie chicken, Michael walks Clinton Kelly and Carla Hall through the deceptively simple recipe while sharing stories from his early days as a 22-year-old executive chef running a packed live-fire kitchen. The conversation turns nostalgic as Michael explains how the dish followed him from restaurant to restaurant and became such a customer favorite that he eventually had to remove it from the menu. The hosts laugh over Michael’s son Kyle unknowingly eating goat cheese for years despite insisting he hated it, while Clinton passionately defends rosemary after recalling a social media argument about the herb. The episode also features sponsor shout-outs to Fresh Direct and Frontgate, plus playful banter about portion sizes, “fat soup diets,” and airplane etiquette after eating rich pasta dishes. Once plated, the hosts rave about the comforting flavors, especially how the chicken melts into the creamy sauce and how the rosemary balances the tanginess of the goat cheese. The episode wraps with the selection of Melicia from New York as the “Fan of the Day,” followed by more joking between the hosts as they finish off the rich and nostalgic dish.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In the debut episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon welcomes viewers into his Venice, California front yard alongside his wife Liz Symon and their friend Olivia Annacone Cisic for an unfiltered, laid-back cookout. Celebrating Cinco de Mayo, Michael prepares simple yet flavorful black cod fish tacos on a plancha, walking through his approach to seasoning, cooking fish by sight, and building a bright, crunchy slaw with cabbage, citrus, and charred poblanos. The conversation flows easily as the trio shares cooking tips, debates ingredients like corn versus flour tortillas, and jokes about knife sharpening habits, cilantro preferences, and home cooking realities. Liz complements the meal with a refreshing jalapeño margarita, balancing heat with fresh lime juice, simple syrup, and a hint of orange liqueur, while adding her own creative twist with lemon and bitters. Throughout the episode, the group emphasizes flexibility in cooking—encouraging viewers to adjust flavors, garnishes, and spice levels to their own tastes. Lighthearted banter continues as they assemble tacos, discuss plating ideas, and highlight optional additions like crema and avocado. The episode wraps with a taste test, enthusiastic reactions to both the tacos and cocktail, and a reminder that great food doesn’t have to be complicated—just fresh, simple, and made with joy.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off a new era of Simply Symons from Venice, California, joined by Liz Symon and Olivia “Liv” Annacone Cisic for a laid-back backyard cookout centered around the ultimate burger debate: smash burgers versus classic pub burgers. Michael walks through the techniques behind each style, from selecting the ideal fat ratio for ground beef to achieving the perfect crust on a hot grill and cast iron griddle. Along the way, the trio shares stories about old Symon’s Dinners episodes, Liv’s transition into motherhood, and the realities of filming outdoors with planes overhead, lawn equipment buzzing nearby, and neighborhood life unfolding around them. As Michael builds both burgers with grilled onions, pickles, secret sauce, and different cheeses, the conversation turns into a humorous discussion about condiments, cooking preferences, smash burger myths, and burger nostalgia. Liz keeps the energy going with playful jabs at Michael while also preparing his favorite cocktail, the bourbon-based Paper Plane, complete with Aperol, Amaro, and fresh lemon juice. The episode wraps with a tasting session comparing both burgers side-by-side, with everyone weighing in on which version wins the battle. Between the casual banter, cooking tips, and family-style atmosphere, the episode delivers an easygoing and highly approachable backyard burger feast.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Memorial Day-themed episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon cooks outdoors with his wife Liz and co-host Olivia Annacone Cisic, preparing grilled shrimp skewers with a honey-soy-orange glaze, a pineapple salsa, and a coconut rice pilaf, while Liz mixes up a frothy pineapple daiquiri with an egg-white twist. The episode opens with playful banter about Olivia's discovery of gray hairs at 33, her upcoming bachelorette party plans, and Michael's gentle ribbing of the trio's early-dinner, early-bedtime lifestyle. Michael walks through his Memorial Day menu, highlighting a coconut rice made with jasmine rice, coconut milk, and a coconut curry lime bone broth from friend Marco Canora's brand Brodo, plus a bright pineapple salsa built with cilantro, scallion, red pepper, jalapeño, honey, and a dashi soy sauce sourced from Santa Monica's McCall's butcher. A lively debate breaks out over rice ratios and rinsing technique, with Liz advocating for a 1:1¾ ratio while Michael sticks to his two-to-one method, and Olivia sharing that she recently cooked jasmine rice for her unwell dog Zeke. Throughout the cooking session, mishaps and humor keep things lively — limes refuse to juice, Liz nearly topples the dashi bottle, and Michael accidentally steps on their dog Min. Discussions range from shrimp varieties and sizing (the U-number system), to the fruity heat of jalapeños and habaneros, to favorite hot sauces including Crystal and the Florida datil-pepper-based Zabs. Liz's honest palate becomes a recurring theme, with Michael crediting her direct, critical feedback as a key ingredient in his culinary success over the years. Liz dry-shakes her egg-white pineapple daiquiri before adding ice for a frothy finish, then adjusts the balance mid-tasting by swirling in extra pineapple juice. The shrimp grill up with beautiful caramelization from the honey glaze, and the coconut rice is finished simply with cilantro and cracked black pepper. During the final tasting, Olivia — a self-described texture-averse pasta lover — bravely tries the shrimp, endorsing the flavors while admitting she prefers the coconut rice. Michael closes the episode wishing viewers a happy Memorial Day and reminding them to keep things simple and delicious.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall brings the heat with a comforting Nashville Hot Chicken Mac and Cheese. Carla builds a heavily spiced, vibrant cheese sauce and folds in crispy chicken and large elbow pasta. The hosts reminisce about Carla's famous ground nut stew from Top Chef, discuss their competitive streaks, and debate the merits of retro candies like Peeps and the 100 Grand bar.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall takes the lead in the kitchen as she introduces a playful and unexpected dish: fried Kool-Aid, inspired by nostalgic state fair treats from her childhood. As she walks through the process of making the vibrant red dough using Kool-Aid powder, flour, sugar, and a leavening agent, Clinton Kelly reacts with skepticism while Michael Symon shares his own less-than-great experience trying the dish at a fair. The conversation quickly turns humorous as Carla recounts a bizarre childhood memory of having a runny nose at the fair, prompting playful teasing from the group. As the dough is fried into donut hole-like bites, the hosts discuss technique, including how the dough naturally flips in hot oil and how to tell when it’s perfectly cooked. Carla elevates the dish by tossing the warm bites in lemon sugar and offering a Kool-Aid glaze for dipping, balancing sweetness with a bright citrus note. Once tasted, both Clinton and Michael are pleasantly surprised, praising the light texture and more refined flavor compared to traditional fair versions. The episode transitions into a lively fan mail segment where the hosts debate their least favorite vegetables and share personal preferences, followed by a special “fan of the day” moment celebrating a crew member’s mother’s birthday with jokes and a spontaneous song from Clinton. The episode wraps with the hosts encouraging viewers to engage with the show and teasing future fun.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon revisits one of the most important dishes of his career as he makes his famous rotisserie chicken mac and cheese, a creamy pasta recipe that first became a hit at his Cleveland restaurant Piccolo Mondo in 1992. programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Monday with an appetizer: Deviled Eggs Three Ways, including a beautiful beet-soaked variation. Things go hilariously off the rails when Carla accidentally adds too much liquid to her yolk filling, turning it into a soupy mess. The hosts embrace the chaos and try to fix it, while also chatting about the Wicked movie, hating cottage cheese, and giving away a trio of Pop Mustard.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly elevates lunchtime with savory French Onion Soup Tartines, topped with melted Gruyere. While the onions caramelize, the trio discusses their love for French food, debates the perfect early dinner time for getting older, and shares hilarious stories about awkward fan encounters including the time a woman on a crowded train told Clinton he looked "so much fatter in person".

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Michael Symon is baking up a batch of his famous brown butter bittersweet chocolate chip cookies. While the cookies bake, the hosts hilariously debate the size of Michael's head, share the secret to always having warm cookies ready, and Clinton confesses his crush on former NPR host David Greene. The episode wraps up with a Frontgate apron giveaway and plenty of sweet, chaotic banter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a quick, "uptown trashy" appetizer: Deviled Cheese Toast. While baking the cheesy, pickle-studded baguette slices, the hosts discuss nostalgic white bread, launch their interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and go on a passionate rant against celebrities who lie about taking weight-loss injections.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Preparing for Tyler Huggins" - This week’s guest, Tyler Huggins (founder and CEO of Meati), is on his way in to the studio. Dave’s not feeling confident, but he starts prepping for the meal anyway.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Dinner with Tyler Huggins" - Our guest this week is Tyler Huggins, founder and CEO of Meati. Dave has prepared a worldwide tour of bar foods that includes “pizza okonomiyaki,” hwe dup bap, galbijjim, and Korean army stew.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave made a special gumbo recipe for a guest...but got a different guest than he bargained for, and one he knows very well. He and his new guest talk off-the-cuff about the differences between jambalaya and gumbo, how New Orleans has the most distinct food culture in any US city, and debate which city best represents the food of the South, all while acknowledging a lack of expertise. They finish with a quick Atlas of where to eat in New Orleans.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave and Chris are joined by Chris' pal (and former boss) Andrew Leland, who talks them through how he went from sedentary to marathon-runner. Andrew discusses why he started running, the program he used to get in shape, and what his running journey was like, including the differences as a runner with retinitis pigmentosa. After, Dave and Chris talk the scientifically ideal running playlist, and go through Dave's and the listeners' playlists to see how they compare.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Today, Dave and Chris are joined by shellfish expert Ari Kolender of Found Oyster. Ari walks through the levels of expertise on oysters and helps everyone gain new knowledge on how to be an oyster Majordomo. The conversation doesn't clam up after the informative chat, though, as Ari joins for a seafood-themed MOIF.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max recreates ancient Sumerian beer using the 4,000-year-old *Hymn to Ninkasi*, detailing a week-long process with soaked barley, bappir bread, malting, crushing, and fermentation with aromatics and date syrup. He explores beer varieties, tavern laws, its role in commerce, and mythology like the drunken tale of Enki and Inanna. The nutty, effervescent brew lasts 2–3 days.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max recreates Medieval Irish corned beef and cabbage from *The Vision of Mac Con Glinne* (c. 1100) with onion-leek pottage. He explores Ireland’s rigid food hierarchy—peasants ate grains and salted meat, butter signified wealth, monks preferred game, nobles had fresh meat—and cultural practices like fosterage, the 7-year child-rearing system, and a satirical poem about King Cathal’s gluttony.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques celebrates birthdays, anniversaries and holidays with special meals. It’s when he splurges on caviar, oysters, even truffles–the ultimate extravagance. These occasions are a time to gather together around the table with family and friends and indulge in our favorite foods and wines.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves seafood and feels lucky to live by Long Island Sound with its wonderful stocks of Atlantic fish and shellfish. He prepares scallops, crab and cod––raw, fried, sauteed or grilled in dishes that are quick, simple and delicious.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Gathering with family and friends around the table or for a game of boules is the life’s greatest pleasure for Jacques. He makes chicken wings, cucumber soup, merguez sausage, zucchini canapes, hummus and his father’s Fromage Fort. Simple food that can be made ahead means that you can enjoy a glass of wine with your company.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques shows that with a well-stocked pantry and a few good cooking techniques, you can make a tasty dish or a simple meal. His pantry essentials include potato flakes for a simple soup, spaghetti for a quick main dish, lentils, canned salmon, polenta and finally, in the freezer, a poundcake that can be transformed into a celebration dessert.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacues knows that most of us want to eat a healthy diet with lots of organic produce. Now so much is available at farmers markets and in grocery stores, you don’t have to spend a fortune if you chose what’s in season when it tastes the best. But for those times you’re in a hurry, it’s okay to grab prewashed, precut or frozen vegetables to make your life easier.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Wagyu Demystified: Wagyu, “Japanese cow” literally, was once an obscure cattle breed from Japan. Today, it’s on restaurant menus and in butcher shops around the world. Get ready for a sumptuous Japanese A5 Rib-Eye with sesame salt and grilled rice cakes, followed by wagyu steak tomahawks with fire-roasted marrow. Then feast your eyes on wagyu smash burgers with parmesan crisps.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Everyone knows that a good barbecue makes the perfect prelude to the game. In this show, we explore how my home state of Florida reimagines three tailgate classics. Get ready for pork shooters stuffed with shrimp, cheese and sausage, wings blasted with fire water, and smoky hamburgers like you’ve never experienced. The secret? Lace them with chopped barbecued brisket.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Victory will be yours! Start the party with chicken legs smoke-roasted over maple wood, then glazed with a fiery fusion of maple syrup and sriracha. A quartet of grilled and smoked beans appears in a colorful side dish. Next up, a trio of internationally-inspired burgers: inside-out American-style burgers; Greek-style spiced lamb burgers; and kaffir lime-scented Thai veal burgers.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Wake up and smell the wood smoke. Some of the world's best breakfast dishes—from bacon to hash—depend on the irresistible flavor of smoke. Discover four smoky twists on breakfast that will give you a reason to rise and shine.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Tailgating gets a lot more interesting when you fire up your smoker! Learn to cook game-changers like smoked chicken nachos; spicy smokehouse wings with Thai Sriracha hot sauce; and smoked bratwurst topped with smoked sauerkraut. Plus, check out a new twist on a tailgate favorite—hickory-smoked burgers with a smoked beer and cheese sauce.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table - Mexamericana
programme.desc: Pati’s family is the perfect example of cultures colliding – Mexican and American. The happy result is the creation of unique and tasty recipes. Pati dives deep into the blending of these cultures and comes up with some classic American recipes that have a delicious Mexican twist. She also takes us to a local restaurant where she learns the owner’s own unique Mex-American story.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Who doesn't love comfort food?? In this episode, Lidia shares some of her most requested and delicious comfort food recipes: Pasta and Bean Soup; Decadent Ham in Marsala Sauce; and her Italian version of one of America's favorites: Hamburger with Homemade Ketchup.

programme.title: Graham Kerrs Kitchen - Minimax Hamburgers
programme.desc: A family favorite made new with beef, sweet raisins, brown rice, lemon juice, curry powder and garlic.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Come summer there is nothing so tasty as grilled meat or fish nestled in a buttery bun. Sara’s got three great choices starting with a poor man’s version of the New England lobster roll, with shrimp taking the starring role on a budget. A turkey burger is made succulent and juicy with the addition of spinach, and finally, pork sliders filled with chopped veggies for flavor, crunch and moisture. Meat on a bun, and bring on the sun.

programme.desc: The Seven Seas Splendor is on a Baltic Odyssey, with stunning views available from the passengers' panoramic balconies. Taking in impressive destinations, the ship is nearing the end of season and the crew want to go out with a bang.

programme.title: Porthole Cruise and Travel Show
programme.desc: If your destination is the Eastern Mediterranean, then Windstar Cruise's Star Legend is the ship you should choose for your journey. On shore, Bill Pannoff visits some of Human Civilization's most sacred territory alive with inspiration.

programme.title: What's Eating Harlem
programme.desc: Harlem Shambles has perfected the age-old process of butchery, selling only meat made from raised-right animals, the exhibits within the Museum of Chinese in America speak volumes, and Lana Turner reveals Harlem's territorial roots.

programme.title: What's Eating Harlem
programme.desc: The Harlem Chocolate Factory is a little slice of chocolate heaven, SoHarlem Inc. and Young Atlas are helping create sustainable economic development in Harlem, and Ortomare Ristorante Pizzeria brings the taste and appeal of Rome to N.Y.C.

programme.title: Andiamo! Uptown
programme.desc: Join Donna in Montreal and experience the cultural and Epicurean wonders found in this amazing city in Quebec. Also, go jet boating and learn why Montreal is the unofficial "world headquarters" for the circus arts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Napa, CA: Marooned in San Francisco, Tony tastes local shellfish and durian ice cream before embarking on a pilgrimage to experience the genius of Thomas Keller, chef and owner of The French Laundry.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Arcachon, France: Here, Bourdain first learned to love food as a child. Returning for a trip down memory lane, Tony enjoys childhood staples, including steak frites, gaufres (waffles), soupe de pecheur (fisherman's soup) and fresh oysters.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Melbourne, Australia boasts hard-living, good-natured, and eccentric lovers of food - Tony's kind of people. In search of the outlaws of food, Tony explores a pasteurization-free cheese factory, and an old-world cured jamon workshop.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY: Passionate about his city, Tony gives us an intimate tour of the New York City foods he loves - sturgeon and bagels, fluke ceviche, pan-seared foie gras, braised veal cheek, authentic cheese and, of course, a hotdog.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY and Provincetown, MA: Experience the formative moments of Tony's career as he revisits his first job, the culinary institute that taught him the basics, a normal workday at Les Halles Brasserie, and his mysterious mentor, Bigfoot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Which style of BBQ reigns supreme - Kansas City, Houston, or North Carolina? Tony journeys to all three cities to taste for himself the secrets behind sauces, wood pits, and slow smokers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Oaxaca, Mexico: Chef Tony Bourdain explores the exotic and colorful indigenous zone of Mexico's Oaxaca region where he tastes toasted grasshoppers and other delicacies. His adventure ends with mariachi music and, of course, lots of tequila.

programme.desc: Jett and Lucie clean Amara's dad's underwater base and help an injured shark. Julian's safety gear interview reveals a crane's trouble and a forklift's heroics.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy help Louis with a chaotic tennis match and AI machine, leading to his success. Jett and Lucie recover a lost golden record from an alien spacecraft, sparking joy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At Noah’s park, Camira hunts block dino eggs with Super Wings, facing surprises when Golden Girl snatches the prize and the egg escapes! Powered by new pod gear, Camira triumphs, while Jett braves the Sahara to find Latu and a fennec fox.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Are You Sleeping Brother John + Kids Songs
programme.desc: This nursery songs series from Junior Squad features popular kids songs for children like "Are You Sleeping Brother John?", "Baby Shark Song", "Wheels on the Bus" and a lot more.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpy & More Kids Rhymes (Little Treehouse)
programme.desc: Do you kids know what happened to Humpty Dumpty when he sat on the wall? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with the Little Tree House gang, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Super Supremes No No Song + More Nursery Rhymes & Kids Songs
programme.desc: Here comes non-stop english rhymes for kids by the Supremes, so stay tuned with us and enjoy listening to your favorite nursery rhymes!

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Welcome to the mystical and of the Little Treehouse! where you are take non magical nursery rhymes journey. Kids will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning kids songs like I spy song, to market to market, animals sounds song, mary had a little lamb, row row row your boat and much, much more while enjoying our friendly characters.

programme.title: Top 50 Nursery Rhymes Collection - Kids TV
programme.desc: Enjoy the Top 50 nursery rhymes by Kids TV. Babies will learn preschool songs with their favorite characters.

programme.title: Super Supremes Dinosaur Song & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: The kids are so excited to learn about dinosaurs. Here is a collection of our best videos.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik has his eyes set upon Queen Aleena's crown jewel, but Sonic, Manic and Sonia plan to retrieve the gem before Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Dulcy exhibits strange behavior, Sally discovers she's going through a "rites of passage" stage of her adolescence. In Dragon tradition, she is drawn to Dragon Lair, a migratory nesting ground, through trance-like visits from her mother.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a blizzard hits Knothole causing Dulcy to demolish a few huts during a landing, Sonic is forced to bunk with Antoine. // During a rainstorm, Rotor is putting the finishing touches on his new female robot assistant, named Ro-Becca.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: From the BerryWorks to Strawberry's Café, everyone is excited about who will win this year's Spring Flower Festival! Berry Bitty City is decorated with colorful banners proclaiming the big event. Lemon works the hardest. For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's a busy day at Lemon's salon, a charming place that is more than just a hair salon; it's one of favorite places for Strawberry and her friends to relax and socialize. All the girls are getting their hair done for the gala grand opening of Mr. Longface's new lawn-bowling and croquet club. They're spirited and laughing and chatting and having a great time, as Lemon runs from one of her friends to the next, doing hair and nails, serving tea and cookies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: From the BerryWorks to Strawberry's Café, everyone is excited about who will win this year's Spring Flower Festival! Berry Bitty City is decorated with colorful banners proclaiming the big event. Lemon works the hardest. For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: From the BerryWorks to Strawberry's Café, everyone is excited about who will win this year's Spring Flower Festival! Berry Bitty City is decorated with colorful banners proclaiming the big event. Lemon works the hardest. For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's friends watch her with wide eyes as she everrrrr-so-gently squirts a layer of blueberry smoothie into a tall glass, trying to not disturb the five other multi-colored layers beneath it. It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's a busy day at Lemon's salon, a charming place that is more than just a hair salon; it's one of favorite places for Strawberry and her friends to relax and socialize. All the girls are getting their hair done for the gala grand opening of Mr. Longface's new lawn-bowling and croquet club. They're spirited and laughing and chatting and having a great time, as Lemon runs from one of her friends to the next, doing hair and nails, serving tea and cookies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas worries about steam engines, Emily arrives in Sodor and Henry wants a job change.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: James gets a new coat of paint, the engines enter a competition and Thomas receives help.

programme.desc: Percy runs away, Spencer comes to the island and Thomas gets snowed in.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: The engines keep a secret, James collects the Queen of Sodor and Emily gets a new route.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas and James collect fireworks, Fergus works in the quarry and Gordon helps Percy.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas and Percy compete, Elizabeth collects Christmas puddings and Edward races Spencer.

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: The brothers examine animals who have built-in camouflage such as stripes and spots.

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: Martin and Chris check out three cool cats: the bobcat, the lynx and the cougar.

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: The brothers explore creature distribution, explaining why creatures live where they do.

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: The Kratt brothers recall their trip to Africa and explore the creatures that live there.

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: Chris and Martin visit South Africa to track the animals of the Savannah.

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: Chris and Martin search the city for animals who call urban areas their home.

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: Chris and Martin travel south of Florida in search of sharks and the other sea creatures.

programme.title: Kratts Creatures
programme.desc: In the African Savannah, Chris and Martin track the elusive African Wild Dog.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend, Marisa who is visiting relatives in India. Barney takes her and the other kids on a trip to the magic caboose to visit pretend countries like Egypt, Tahiti, and India. When they were in a pretend country of India, they saw a real elephant and in the end, Melanie gets a email from her friend in India (who has also seen a real elephant in India!). BJ wants to be a great magician, but he doesn't want to spend any time practicing. He convinces Baby Bop to help him do a trick, and makes her disappear. When BJ thought she is gone forever, he realizes the importance of practice. Luckily, Baby Bop hasn't disappeared after all!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends are decorating the caboose for Christmas when Barney decides to plan a Secret Santa game. Everyone has to buy or make a gift for the friend whose name they have drawn. Melanie misses the mailman, so Barney takes her to Santa's workshop at the North Pole to deliver her wish list in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff decides to create a musical zoo when their zoo trip is postponed. Gathering instruments that sound like real animals, Riff gives Barney and his friends a zoo-mazing experience. When Baby Bop hesitates on keeping her promise to watch Ryan's pet frog, Barney tells her the story of The Frog Prince. And Baby Bop learns about keeping her promises.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, she wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel. First, they all make cardboard cars out of some scrap boxes. Next, everyone pretends to be an airplane. Then Barney turns the cardboard airplanes into a great big cardboard bus. They go on a camera safari only to discover the last mode of their transportation--a big cardboard cruise ship.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After noticing parts of the moon are missing in the night sky, Baby Bop is determined to find the rest of it. It's up to Barney and the kids to help Baby Bop take a trip to outer space where they meet Mr. Moon. Baby Bop then learns that the moon is not always full at night.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Daniel fails miserably when he tries to join the others in jump rope. Convinced that he's too little to do anything right, Barney tells him the story of The Sword in the Sandbox. Through the legend of King Arthur, Daniel learns there are many things he can do... if he tries hard enough.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesnt think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try, by recounting the tale of his great-great-grandfather Riffle the Wild West hero!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty is the best policy. Meanwhile, Myra, has decided she doesn't like her name. After learning about many names and what they mean, Barney helps Myra see how special her name truly is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends are decorating the caboose for Christmas when Barney decides to plan a Secret Santa game. Everyone has to buy or make a gift for the friend whose name they have drawn. Melanie misses the mailman, so Barney takes her to Santa's workshop at the North Pole to deliver her wish list in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff decides to create a musical zoo when their zoo trip is postponed. Gathering instruments that sound like real animals, Riff gives Barney and his friends a zoo-mazing experience. When Baby Bop hesitates on keeping her promise to watch Ryan's pet frog, Barney tells her the story of The Frog Prince. And Baby Bop learns about keeping her promises.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, she wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel. First, they all make cardboard cars out of some scrap boxes. Next, everyone pretends to be an airplane. Then Barney turns the cardboard airplanes into a great big cardboard bus. They go on a camera safari only to discover the last mode of their transportation--a big cardboard cruise ship.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After noticing parts of the moon are missing in the night sky, Baby Bop is determined to find the rest of it. It's up to Barney and the kids to help Baby Bop take a trip to outer space where they meet Mr. Moon. Baby Bop then learns that the moon is not always full at night.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Daniel fails miserably when he tries to join the others in jump rope. Convinced that he's too little to do anything right, Barney tells him the story of The Sword in the Sandbox. Through the legend of King Arthur, Daniel learns there are many things he can do... if he tries hard enough.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesnt think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try, by recounting the tale of his great-great-grandfather Riffle the Wild West hero!

programme.title: Bob Dole, Italy and World War 2
programme.desc: Some of the most brutal, merciless and chaotic fighting of World War II took part in the mountains of Italy and lasted until the final days of the war. Even as the Allies advanced into the heart of Berlin in May of 1945, the battle for Italy continued. Many soldiers were affected by their time fighting in Italy and the horrific conditions they faced there. BOB DOLE, ITALY AND WORLD WAR II is about those who lived through one of World War IIs most desperate fights, including the young lieutenant from Kansas whose unforgettable ordeal in Italy would shape his life of public service.

programme.title: World War II: Saving the Reality
programme.desc: Narrated by Dan Aykroyd. Tells the story of an individual who owns the largest private collection of World War II artifacts in the world. Over 50 interviews with veterans and survivors of the war help tell the story of the meaning of the over 7,000 individual items in the collection of Kenneth W. Rendell.

programme.title: Surrender on the USS Missouri
programme.desc: On September 2nd, 1945, World War II came to its official end aboard a legendary battleship anchored in Tokyo Bay: the USS Missouri. Some seventy million people had died during the war, but now the fighting would end not with a rifle shot but rather with the swift stroke of a ceremonial pen.SURRENDER ON THE USS MISSOURI focuses on the sailors, soldiers, airmen and marines that witnessed the official Japanese surrender. It was one of the most monumental days in history, and only a few witnesses remain.The USS Missouri hadn't been in the fight long, heading into the Pacific theater of war in 1944, but she would become one of the most famous military ships in history when all was said and done. Mighty Mo had been involved in the vicious fight at Iwo Jima and then headed for Okinawa, where she dodged suicidal Kamikaze air attacks during World War II's last great battle. Missouri then bombed Japan before being told to leave the coast for no apparent reason. The reason turned out to be two atomic bombs that were set to be dropped on the cities of Hiroshima and Nagasaki.Through interviews with those who served on the battleship, the film also follows the USS Missouri from its construction, through varied battles in the Pacific, to its final resting place as a memorial and museum in Pearl Harbor.SURRENDER ON THE USS MISSOURI features exclusive drone footage of the Missouri, plus never-before-seen photos of the surrender ceremony provided by those who were there. Pacific War historian Daniel Martinez also lends his perspective to the film.

programme.title: Rommel: The Soldier, The Son, and Hitler
programme.desc: ROMMEL: THE SOLDIER, THE SON, AND HITLER provides rare insight into the military career and personal life of Germany's most famous WWII commander, Field Marshal Erwin Rommel. Told from the perspective of Erwin's son Manfred, it is the story of what happens when a career soldier runs afoul of a dictator.Highly decorated and one of Hitler's favorite commanders in the early years of World War II, the Desert Fox, as his British adversaries labeled him, was somewhat of an enigma. Never a member of the Nazi party, Rommel detested the blending of politics and war. He would quickly discover that both were always in play in Hitler's Germany.Rommel was somewhat nave to Hitler's ways until the latter days of the Afrika Korps defeat in North Africa in 1943. By then, Rommel started to surmise that Germany's fate was sealed. In charge of the famed and flawed Atlantic Wall in western Europe in late 1943, Rommel tried his best to prepare France for the Allied invasion. In the end, it would not be enough. D-Day's success only reinforced Rommel's belief that Adolf Hitler should sue for peace in the west.It was an opinion that Hitler found treasonous.
